arts.ttl: Alan Shearer and Chris Sutton agree on Newcastle vs Villa prediction with 'ruthless' verdict
arts.sum: "Aston Villa had hit a bit of form again and they were brilliant against Man City, three points would set up Newcastle well going into that match at Old Trafford next week," Shearer told Betfair. Newcastle United have hit form at an important time, but know Aston Villa will be a tough test of their credentials this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Newcastle ‘very, very interested’ in Lens’ Abdukodir Khusanov
arts.sum: Abdukodir Khusanov (20) looks increasingly likely to leave RC Lens in January. The centre-back has impressed since asserting himself as a first-team regular at the start of the season, however,…

arts.ttl: Player ‘welcomes’ Newcastle United exit in January – Direct contact with Magpies
arts.sum: Botafogo have emerged as a new contender to sign Newcastle United’s Miguel Almirón in the winter market. That’s according to Globo Esporte, who state the Brazilian club are willing to offer the 30-year-old an escape route from Newcastle. The winger has seen his game time at Newcastle reduced this season, clocking in 136 minutes from The post Player ‘welcomes’ Newcastle United exit in January – Direct contact with Magpies appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa player can be ‘symbolic signing’ in January – House already ready
arts.sum: Aston Villa goalkeeper Robin Olsen has been linked with a move back to Malmö FF in the winter market. Two months ago, we covered claims from Sweden which stated Malmö are making a firm attempt to secure the 34-year-old’s services. Malmö stopper Johan Dahlin is set for a long spell on the sidelines after suffering The post Aston Villa player can be ‘symbolic signing’ in January – House already ready appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery's St James' Park verdict as Newcastle United look to add to Aston Villa away misery
arts.sum: A 3-3 thriller with Liverpool was followed up by 4-0 and 3-1 thrashings of Leicester City and Brentford, respectively, at St James' Park and a repeat of those performances would give Newcastle an outstanding chance of beating Villa this week. Unai Emery came mightily close to calling St James' Park his home stadium - but now is plotting to how overcome Newcastle United in their own backyard this week.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United reveal Sandro Tonali plans for 2025 amid speculation frenzy in Italy
arts.sum: But Howe does not feel that Tonali's head will be turned after watching the midfielder overcome a 10-month ban dished out by FIFA for illegal betting last season, the head coach has no qualms about the reporting frenzy that may lie ahead for the star. Howe said: "When I first saw Sandro play, there were definite links to Pirlo without a doubt - and it’s not just the hair!

arts.ttl: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Aston Villa with big midfield question answered
arts.sum: After that 4-0 win over IIpswich Town last weekend, few would blame Eddie Howe for keeping the same Newcastle United XI for today's Premier League clash with Aston Villa at St James' Park. That could mean Joelinton's physical presence may be a deciding element today, with Willock a strong option to change things from the bench.

arts.ttl: Paul Mitchell's 'three in and three out' Newcastle United dream as January window approaches
arts.sum: Have a bit of a clear out and as I mentioned in past podcasts when we sat down with Paul Mitchell a few weeks after he arrived, he talked about like a recycling of the squad that you could get every window - he was looking at like three in, three out. "I think they're going to have to work out deals to get rid of fringe players to free up whatever the money can," Simon told episode host Andrew Musgrove.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs. Aston Villa: Unai Emery's side bidding to avoid ending 89-year streak in Boxing Day fixture
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be bidding to avoid equalling an 89-year streak when they face Newcastle United in the Premier League on Boxing Day.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Aston Villa Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Newcastle will look to build upon their 4-0 win at Ipswich last time out when they take on Aston Villa at St. James’ Park in the Premier League on Boxing Day. Ahead of the clash, we’ve...
